experimental_design: a new set of experiments comprising well-watered, 7-day drought-stressed, as well as 7-day drought-stressed and rewatered plants was conducted
factor_value: the protein changes between drought-stressed, well-watered, and recovered plants were evaluated
number_of_fractions: fractionated at three concentrations of 12.5%, 17.5%, and 50% ACN
number_of_samples: 8 biological replicates and 3 fractions imply a total of 24 samples
